prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-BLE-ACACIAWOODBOARD-STD Product Type: CUTTING_BOARD Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Thick Cut Acacia Wood Cutting Board Kitchen Decor Charcuterie Serving Setting with Unique 1.2 Inch Thickness Description: Elevate your kitchen with the Beille Acacia Wood Chopping Board, a durable and versatile kitchen essentials item, crafted from naturally strong and water resistant acacia wood. Built to withstand daily use, this wooden cutting board is perfect for meal prep, colorful crudité spreads or styling charcuterie boards, making it a piece you’ll reach for time and time again.

Designed with functionality in mind, the board measures 13.75 by 9.75 inches and boasts a substantial 1.2-inch thickness, offering a stable, weighty surface for slicing, chopping, or styling food. The cutting boards medium size strikes the perfect balance: large enough for entertaining, yet compact enough for everyday kitchen tasks and storage, while the natural variations of acacia wood create a one of a kind piece that is as beautiful as it is practical.

We love natural accents here at Beille and this wooden cutting board hits the mark; cottage, cabin, residential or other, the natural wood grain adds a warm, welcoming and organic touch to any space. And, for ease of use, the chopping board includes a thoughtfully designed cut out handle that makes lifting, carrying, and storing simple and effortless. The wooden cutting board is also gentle on knives, helping to preserve the sharpness of blades over time.

The Beille Acacia Wood Cutting Board is more than just a meal prep tool, it’s a stylish, durable, and multifunctional addition to any kitchen, perfect for cooking, entertaining, and easily styling with existing kitchen décor. Add this chopping board to your kitchen, or gift it as a thoughtful hostess, housewarming, wedding present or gift for Mom.

PLEASE NOTE: Wood grain may differ from board to board given the natural acacia wood material

Weight: 3.50lbs Search Terms: Acacia wood cutting board; chopping board; cutting boards for kitchen; food meal prep; kitchen essentials; hostess gift; wooden cutting board; farmhouse kitchen home decor; charcuterie boards; gifts for mom; house warming gifts new home; crudite Features: - ACACIA WOOD CHOPPING BOARD: Naturally strong and water resistant, this acacia wood cutting board from Beille is built to be used; whether for colorful crudite spreads, charcuterie board styling or food and meal prep, this chopping board is a must have kitchen essentials item that you’ll reach for again and again - FUNCTIONAL SIZE: Measuring 13.75 x 9.75 inches, with a substantial 1.2 inch thickness, our acacia wood cutting board offers a durable, weighty, and stable surface that’s both functional and aesthetically pleasing for a variety of tasks or food display suitable for any kitchen - KITCHEN DÉCOR: We love natural accents here at Beille and this wooden cutting board hits the mark; cottage, cabin, residential or other, the natural wood grain adds a warm, welcoming and organic touch to any space - CHARCUTERIE BOARDS: Medium sized cutting board offers the perfect surface for styling charcuterie boards, crudite spreads, appetizers or any other kind of snack board; cutting board makes a great hostess, gift for mom, housewarming gift, wedding gift and more - EASY GRIP HANDLE: Designed with a convenient cut out handle, that makes lifting, carrying and storing easy without added strain or difficulty; please note that wood grain may differ from board to board given the natural acacia wood material === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 13.75 x 9.75 Inch Acacia Wood Cutting Board
